# Repository Topics / GitHub Description

description: "Production-grade, idempotent Ubuntu Server 24.04 LTS bootstrap framework — turns a fresh install into a fully-configured enterprise homelab with Traefik, Docker, Authentik SSO, Prometheus/Grafana/Loki monitoring, Restic backups, and security hardening (UFW, Fail2Ban, AppArmor, kernel sysctl) in one command."
